summary: M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 is closed after PR #237 passed both required PR Gate jobs, merged into origin/main, and the accepted strategic terrain schema commit entered main at e7807efe1494a6a844dfe74dd6e5f75dd1e7ab3b. The next dependency-ready M7 task is M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001.

tests_run.result: format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed before PR creation; architecture self-test reported 15 expected violations.
Focused deterministic and negative strategic terrain tests passed before PR creation; 4 test files passed; 57 tests passed.
PR #237 merged and local main fast-forwarded to e7807efe1494a6a844dfe74dd6e5f75dd1e7ab3b.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 CLOSED only after PR CI passed and origin/main contained the accepted schema changes.
Promote M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 to READY because its dependency M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 is now integrated in main.
M7 content lock remains rejected until fixture, renderer-interaction, validation, and product-owner reconsideration complete.

risks.summary: Schema work alone does not make the player-facing map acceptable.
risks.mitigation: Continue immediately to M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001, then renderer-interaction and validation.

requested_action: Start M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 as the next READY M7 task.
